page.title: Permissions
page.subtitle: Manage permission hierarchy, resources, actions, and HTTP method metadata

dialog.deleteLeafDescription: Delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
dialog.deleteBranchDescription: Delete "{name}" and all of its children? This action cannot be undone.

create.title: Create permission
create.description: Maintain permission identity, resource, action, HTTP method metadata, and hierarchy

update.title: Edit permission
update.description: Update the current permission details and hierarchy position

copy.title: Copy permission
copy.description: Create a new permission based on the current one. Update the code to ensure it is unique.

basic.title: Basic information
basic.description: Define the parent node, code, and display name

route.title: Resource mapping
route.description: Describe the resource, action, HTTP method metadata, and usage notes for this permission

parent.label: Parent permission
parent.title: Choose parent permission
parent.description: Expand the permission tree and choose a new parent node
parent.empty: No parent permissions are currently available

validation.max: Permission code must be 100 characters or fewer
Permission name must be 100 characters or fewer
Resource must be 255 characters or fewer
Action must be 100 characters or fewer

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: Explain the business meaning of this permission

validation.max: Description must be 500 characters or fewer

validation.int: Sort order must be an integer
validation.min: Sort order cannot be less than 0

sidebar.title: Permission tree
sidebar.subtitle: Browse the hierarchy and switch the current permission
sidebar.emptySearchDescription: Try another keyword or clear the search
sidebar.emptyDefaultDescription: Create a root permission first, then add child items

detail.emptyDescription: Select a node on the left to view details and children
detail.emptyChildrenTitle: No child permissions under this node
detail.emptyChildrenDescription: You can continue by adding child permissions
